files_modified: All src/**/*.ts files that populate-coderef --source-headers elects to stamp (unknown until run)
downstream_consumers: Any consumer that reads semantic header blocks in source files (documentation tools, IDE extensions)

risks.title: Headers stamped on files that already have conflicting docblocks
risks.mitigation: Review diff before committing. Abort commit if output looks garbled or overwrites existing meaningful docblocks.

risks.title: populate-coderef --source-headers modifies test files unexpectedly
risks.mitigation: Review diff scope. Test files should not have semantic headers — check whether the flag skips test dirs.

risks.title: Branch diverges from main if left unmerged while main advances
risks.mitigation: Dogfood branch is review-only. ORCHESTRATOR decides merge timing.

candidates.change: Add CodeRef-Semantics semantic header block via --source-headers flag

dependencies: .coderef/index.json (must be up-to-date for accurate header stamping)

decision_records.decision: Run from coderef-core root on . (self-dogfood). Feature branch only, no merge.
decision_records.rationale: Dogfood pattern: test populate-coderef --source-headers on the project that implements it before enabling more broadly.
